title: COM object that has been separated from its underlying RCW cannot be used.
author: tecxx
body_snippet:
When moving the mRemoteNG main window it goes from full screen to window size. 

If there is an active RDP connection, the following error pops up:

![image](https://github.com/mRemoteNG/mRemoteNG/assets/4305825/6b7dcd3b-c8eb-4237-806a-787275b4e2af)

   at System.StubHelpers.StubHelpers.GetCOMIPFromRCW(Object objSrc, IntPtr pCPCMD, IntPtr& ppTarget, Boolean& pfNeedsRelease)
   at MSTSCLib.IMsRdpClient6.get_AdvancedSettings2()
   at mRemoteNG.Connection.Protocol.RDP.RdpProtocol.get_SmartS...

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
Update from fork release track (v1.79 bootstrap): candidate fix is packaged in PR #3119.  
  
PR: PR #3119 on `mRemoteNG/mRemoteNG`  
Fork CI validation: CI run 21793657159 on `robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`  
  
Patch scope:  
- harden SmartSize COM access against RCW-disconnected state  
- skip resize if RDP control is disposed/unavailable  
  
Please review and relabel/close when verified on upstream branch.

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available in community release**

This fix is included in a community build from our fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). Available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and let us know if the issue is fully resolved.
